title: Airway Spatial Transcriptomics in Smoking.
author: Morrow JD El-Husseini ZW Yun JH Hersh CP
content:
S-EPMC11998807 PMC11998807 Airway Spatial Transcriptomics in Smoking.

Background

Cigarette smoking has a significant impact on global health. Although cessation has positive health benefits, some molecular changes to intercellular communications may persist in the lung. In this study we
